name: rateloop-workspace
description: Connect Codex to one RateLoop workspace through host-native OAuth.

interface.shortDescription: Connect this agent to a RateLoop workspace
interface.longDescription: Activates RateLoop's OAuth-protected workspace server so an agent can claim one single-use connection message, load its bound policy, and verify readiness without receiving a bearer credential in chat.
defaultPrompt: Use $rateloop-workspace-connection to connect this agent to my RateLoop workspace
